race_meta.race_name: Win £250,000 With BetMGM's Golden Goals Classified Stakes (Class 6)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed ring of gold at position 2 (22.0% probability) vs top pick Homer Stokes (35.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~13.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Homer Stokes > Ring Of Gold, but actual result was Ring Of Gold > Homer Stokes. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Ring Of Gold had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 2.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
